summary: US-Iran ceasefire negotiations entered a second round today, with Tehran reportedly sending a delegation to Islamabad as Trump warned he would not extend the truce without a deal, keeping the Strait of Hormuz in play as the dominant risk lever across energy, equities, and bonds.
tweet: Iran ceasefire deadline is live — Trump says no extension without a deal and the Strait stays blocked, keeping oil, gold, and risk appetite all hostage to the same headline.
